name: heartbeat
job: Read the file at agent-job/HEARTBEAT.md and complete the tasks described there.

name: builderbrain-weekly-verification-writeback
job: Read agents/builderbrain-verifier/SYSTEM.md for operating rules, then read agents/builderbrain-verifier/jobs/weekly-verification-writeback.md and complete it end-to-end.

name: codex-postfix-test
command: mkdir -p logs/strategy && cat agents/codex-postfix-test/SYSTEM.md agents/codex-postfix-test/jobs/generate-report.md | codex exec --ephemeral --color never --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox -C /home/coding-agent/workspace -o /home/coding-agent/workspace/logs/strategy/codex-postfix-test.md -

name: gemini-postfix-test
command: mkdir -p logs/strategy /home/coding-agent/workspace/.tmp && cat agents/gemini-postfix-test/SYSTEM.md agents/gemini-postfix-test/jobs/generate-report.md | npx -y @google/gemini-cli --prompt "Follow the instructions provided on stdin, use the current repository as context, and output only the final markdown report." --yolo > /home/coding-agent/workspace/.tmp/gemini-postfix-test.md && mv /home/coding-agent/workspace/.tmp/gemini-postfix-test.md /home/coding-agent/workspace/logs/strategy/gemini-postfix-test.md
